# zstack_scheduler_trigger (Resource)

Manages a scheduler trigger in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the scheduler trigger.
- `scheduler_type` (String) The type of the scheduler trigger (e.g. 'simple' or 'cron').

### Optional

- `cron` (String) The cron expression for cron-type triggers.
- `description` (String) A description for the scheduler trigger.
- `repeat_count` (Number) The number of times to repeat the trigger.
- `scheduler_interval` (Number) The scheduler interval in seconds.
- `start_time` (Number) The start time of the trigger as Unix timestamp.

### Read-Only

- `stop_time` (Number) The stop time of the trigger as Unix timestamp.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the scheduler trigger.
